title: eragrostis coelachyrum
intro: Eragrostis coelachyrum, also known as kangaroo grass, is a species of grass native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis coelachyrum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
